home.title: Support and Hope for Those in Need
home.subtitle: Together we build a better future in Portugal.
home.mission_desc: Providing essential support to vulnerable families and individuals, ensuring dignity and basic resources.
home.step1_desc: Fill out our online form with your details and needs simply and quickly.
home.step2_desc: Our team evaluates your request with the utmost confidentiality and care.
home.step3_desc: We contact you to provide the necessary help and resources.

about.title: About Dádiva Solidária
about.history: Dádiva Solidária was born in 2020 during a time of great global need. Since then, we have dedicated ourselves to being a bridge between those who want to help and those who need it most. We believe solidarity is the fundamental pillar for a fairer society.
about.location: Based in Portugal, we have a network of passionate volunteers that allows us to operate from north to south, bringing hope to all regions and ensuring no one is left behind.
about.actions: Our actions focus on three main pillars: continuous food support for needy families, sharing urgent medical expenses, and supporting access to education for children and youth.

request.title: Help Request Form
request.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data to evaluate my request.
request.success: Your request has been successfully submitted. Our team will contact you soon.
request.error: An error occurred while submitting your request. Please try again later.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help and answer any questions. Don't hesitate to reach out.
